1.title: Chapter 1 Worksheet: Foundations
1.html:
Chapter 1 Worksheet: Foundations

Name: [Type Name]

Part 1: Vocabulary Matching

Options:
A. Erased when power is off   | B. Hiding complex details
C. The physical spine         | D. The "Brain" of the computer
E. Image specialist processor | F. Math and logic handler
G. Fast permanent storage     | H. Short-term workspace

1. CPU          [___]

2. RAM          [___]

3. ALU          [___]

4. Volatile     [___]

5. Abstraction  [___]

6. Motherboard  [___]

7. SSD          [___]

8. GPU          [___]

Part 2: Multiple Choice

9. Which part of the CPU acts as the "Traffic Cop"? [___]
a) ALU   b) Control Unit   c) SSD   d) Power Supply

10. Correct order of the CPU cycle? [___]
a) Decode-Fetch-Execute   b) Execute-Decode-Fetch   c) Fetch-Decode-Execute

11. Example of an "Input" device? [___]
a) Monitor   b) Printer   c) Speaker   d) Webcam

12. Why is SSD preferred over HDD? [___]
a) Cheaper   b) Spinning platter   c) Faster, no moving parts

13. Smart microwave is an example of: [___]
a) General Purpose   b) Embedded System   c) OS

Part 3 & 4: Short Answer

14. The Boot Process: Explain what happens to the OS when you turn on a computer.
[Type your answer here...]

15. The "Lag" Test: Game takes 5 minutes to load. Is it GPU or Storage? Why?
[Type your answer here...]

16. Accessibility: Name one Output device for a visual impairment.
[Type your answer here...]

2.html:
Chapter 2 Worksheet: Skills & Troubleshooting

Part 1: Vocabulary Matching

Options:
A. Visual interaction with icons | B. Core part of OS
C. Software translator for devices | D. Hiding complex details
E. Text-only command interface | F. Hardware check at startup
G. Unknown security hole | H. Exact home address of a file

1. Kernel [___]

2. GUI [___]

3. CLI [___]

4. POST [___]

5. Driver [___]

6. Abstraction [___]

7. Path [___]

8. Zero-Day [___]

Part 2: Multiple Choice

9. Which historical metaphor did the 1984 Macintosh use? [___]
a) Library b) Desktop c) Kitchen d) Workshop

10. Tool used to force a frozen app to close? [___]
a) BIOS b) File Explorer c) Task Manager / Activity Monitor d) Device Manager

Part 3: Technical Logic

11. The Beep Code: Screen is black, hear 3 beeps. Where is the error from and why?
[Type Response Here]
